sp_widget.description: IDP Observability Dashboard — real-time platform health tiles, trend graphs, and service dependency map placeholder. Role-filtered views: SRE full, Developer limited, Product Owner summary.
sp_widget.name: IDP Observability Dashboard
sp_widget.template:
Platform Health

Real-time platform observability dashboard — Auto-refreshes every 60s — Refreshing...

Status Overview

Deployment Success Rate
{{c.formatPct(c.metrics.deployment_success_rate)}}
{{c.metrics.total_deployments_7d || 0}} deployments in 7 days
Active Incidents
{{c.metrics.incidents.total || 0}}
{{c.metrics.incidents.critical}} Critical {{c.metrics.incidents.high}} High
Mean Time to Recover
{{c.formatHours(c.metrics.mttr_hours)}}
Last 30 days
{{svc.name}}
{{c.formatPct(svc.availability)}}
Availability

Deployment Trends (7-Day)

Period Deployments
{{row.day}} {{row.count}}

Service Dependency Map

🗺 Service Topology
Dynamic service dependency visualization will be rendered here once the monitoring integration is connected.
